---
title: "LeetCode 20. Valid Parentheses"
subtitle: "有效的括號"
lang: zh-TW
date: 2026-07-18
author: Anthony
categories: [LeetCode, String, Stack]
description: "[題目連結](https://leetcode.com/problems/valid-parentheses/description/)"
image: ../../cover/Leetcode.svg
alternate-lang: "/dsa/posts/leetcode/0020-valid-parentheses/0020-valid-parentheses-en.html"
---

給定一個只包含 `(`、`)`、`{`、`}`、`[`、`]` 的字串 `s`，判斷這個字串是否為有效的。一個字串是**有效的**，必須滿足以下條件：

1. 左括號必須用相同類型的右括號閉合；
2. 左括號必須以正確的順序閉合；
3. 每個右括號都必須有對應相同類型的左括號。

例如給定

```
s = "()[]{}"
```

每個括號都由相同類型、且順序正確地閉合，因此這個字串有效，答案為 `true`。但若給定

```
s = "([)]"
```

`(` 先開，接著 `[` 也開啟；但下一個閉合的括號是 `)`，卻不是對應最近開啟的 `[`。括號閉合的順序錯誤，因此這個字串無效，答案為 `false`。

## 想法

本題的關鍵是**右括號必須對應到最近一個尚未閉合的左括號**，對應到的正式堆疊後進先出的特性。建立在此特性上，另一個更根本的問題是：如何確定對應？

事實上，這個對應可以想像為**消消樂**——由左至右掃描字串：每當遇到左括號，就將它推入堆疊。每當遇到右括號，就取出堆疊頂端的元素並檢查它是否為對應的左括號，如果對應到了就將已經存放在堆疊中的左括號取出（移除）。如果需要取出時堆疊是空的，或取出的括號不匹配，字串就立即判定為無效。

掃描完整個字串後，只有當堆疊為空時，字串才是有效的——堆疊中若還留有元素，代表有左括號被開啟卻從未被閉合。

## 實作

::: {.panel-tabset}
## C

```c
bool isValid(char *s)
{
    char *stack = (char *)malloc(10000 * sizeof(char));
    int count = 0;

    for (size_t i = 0; i < strlen(s); i++)
    {
        if (s[i] == '(' || s[i] == '[' || s[i] == '{')
        {
            // Push the opening bracket
            stack[count++] = s[i];
        }
        else
        {
            // Closing bracket with nothing to match
            if (count == 0)
            {
                return false;
            }

            char last = stack[count - 1];
            if (
                (s[i] == ')' && last == '(') ||
                (s[i] == ']' && last == '[') ||
                (s[i] == '}' && last == '{'))
            {
                // Matches the most recently opened bracket
                count--;
            }
            else
                return false;
        }
    }

    return count == 0;
}
```

## C++

```cpp
class Solution
{
public:
    bool isValid(string s)
    {
        vector<char> stack;

        for (auto ch : s)
        {
            if (ch == '(' || ch == '[' || ch == '{')
            {
                // Push the opening bracket
                stack.push_back(ch);
            }
            else
            {
                // Closing bracket with nothing to match
                if (stack.empty())
                {
                    return false;
                }

                char last = stack.back();
                if (
                    (ch == ')' && last == '(') ||
                    (ch == ']' && last == '[') ||
                    (ch == '}' && last == '{'))
                {
                    // Matches the most recently opened bracket
                    stack.pop_back();
                }
                else
                    return false;
            }
        }

        return stack.empty();
    }
};
```

## Python

```python
class Solution:
    def isValid(self, s: str) -> bool:
        stack = []

        for ch in s:
            if ch == "(" or ch == "[" or ch == "{":
                # Push the opening bracket
                stack.append(ch)
            else:
                # Closing bracket with nothing to match
                if not stack:
                    return False

                last = stack[-1]
                if (
                    (ch == ")" and last == "(")
                    or (ch == "]" and last == "[")
                    or (ch == "}" and last == "{")
                ):
                    # Matches the most recently opened bracket
                    stack.pop()
                else:
                    return False

        return not stack
```
:::
